case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MARIA MAGDALENA YOC DIAZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA MAGDALENA YOC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA MAGDALENA YOC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA MAGDALENA YOC $1,780.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,895.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN DELINQUENCY BY DEFENDANT. AWARD REVISED DOWNWARD PER PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNTING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00- SERVED DEC-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA MAGDALENA YOC
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA MAGDALENA YOC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILLEF. CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/23/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
